name: verity-forensics
description: Calibrated, reproducible likelihood ratios for forensic surface marks (bullet lands, cartridge breech faces, toolmarks). Every answer is a calibrated weight of evidence with a reproducible recipe handle — or an honest refusal. Never a fabricated number.

tools.name: detect_mark_type
tools.description: Suggest striated vs impressed for a scan.

tools.name: compare_marks
tools.description: Compare two marks → a calibrated likelihood ratio + recipe handle.

tools.name: calibrate_score
tools.description: Map a score → bounded LR (the calibration firewall).

user_config.name: api_url
user_config.title: Verity API URL
user_config.description: Base URL of the Verity API (the hosted instance, or your own deployment).
